story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Habb.ch was founded in Switzerland with the vision of combining traditional Swiss values such as precision, reliability, and quality with modern technological innovation.
story.p2: As brothers with strong academic backgrounds in Computer Science and Business Information Systems, we bring together deep technical expertise and a solid understanding of business processes. Our shared mission is to support Swiss companies in adopting AI automation, digital transformation, and intelligent IT solutions in a practical and sustainable way.
story.p3: We believe that technology should empower businesses and not complicate them. That is why our team works relentlessly to deliver solutions that are not only technically excellent, but also efficient, user-friendly, and tailored to real-world business needs.
story.p4: Today, we serve clients across industries, helping them navigate the digital landscape with confidence and success.

smartmail.tagline: Automatic Email Classification & AI Based Quotation Generation
smartmail.overviewText:
HABB AI Solutions is an intelligent email automation solution for SMEs. The system analyses incoming emails, automatically detects invoices, quotation requests, general inquiries or spam, and processes them in a structured manner.
Complete quotation requests are transferred directly to your accounting or ERP software and prepared as a draft. If information is missing, the AI automatically requests it via email. Employees only review the generated draft and send the quotation.
Data is stored either in Switzerland or Germany – fully compliant with DSG and GDPR.
smartmail.keyFeatures: [{"icon":"Mail","title":"Automatic Email Classification","description":"AI reliably detects invoices, quotation requests, general inquiries, and spam automatically."},{"icon":"FileText","title":"AI-Powered Quotation Generation","description":"Complete quotation requests are prepared as ready-to-send drafts in your accounting or ERP software."},{"icon":"Zap","title":"Automatic Follow-Up Requests","description":"If details are missing, the system automatically requests them from the sender via email."},{"icon":"Database","title":"ERP & Accounting Integration","description":"Seamless connection to common ERP and accounting systems without manual effort."},{"icon":"ShieldCheck","title":"DSG & GDPR Compliant","description":"Data stored in Switzerland or Germany – fully legally compliant."}]
smartmail.ctaDescription: Contact us today for a personal demo of HABB AI Solutions.

habbOne.productName: HABB One – ERP for Swiss SME Workshops
habbOne.tagline: Modular, bilingual ERP – multi-tenant, productive from day one
habbOne.overviewText:
HABB One is a modular, bilingual ERP for Swiss SME workshops. Multi-tenant and productive from day one – covering CRM and order processing, quotations and invoices with Swiss QR-bill, workshop planning, staff planning, time tracking and business reports.
Employees clock in and out via a 4-digit PIN on the iPad kiosk. The back office sees revenue, orders, capacity, attendance, balances, holidays and alerts in real time.
Monthly reports and documents can be exported as CSV, Excel or PDF with company logo. First reference installation: Tschannen Spritzwerk AG, Burgdorf.
habbOne.keyFeatures: [{"icon":"Clock","title":"Time Tracking & iPad Kiosk","description":"Employees clock in and out with a 4-digit PIN – including real-time attendance, balances and holidays in the back office."},{"icon":"Users","title":"CRM & Order Processing","description":"Manage customers, orders and the workshop flow centrally – from first contact to delivery."},{"icon":"FileText","title":"Quotations & QR Invoices","description":"Create quotations and send invoices with the Swiss QR-bill – without media breaks."},{"icon":"Calendar","title":"Workshop & Staff Planning","description":"The auto-scheduler plans orders and staff efficiently and shows capacity at a glance."},{"icon":"BarChart3","title":"Business Reports & Export","description":"Revenue, order and attendance reports as CSV, Excel or PDF with company logo."},{"icon":"ShieldCheck","title":"Multi-Tenant & Swiss-Compliant","description":"Multi-tenant, bilingual (DE/EN), Europe/Zurich time zone – productive from day one."}]
habbOne.ctaDescription: HABB One is available on request. Contact us for a personal introduction and more information.

habbOne.teaserText: Modular, bilingual ERP: time tracking, CRM, quotations, QR invoices, workshop planning and reports – productive from day one. Available on request.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: Habb.ch is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect information you provide directly, such as contact details when you fill out forms, as well as technical data like IP addresses and browser information.

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.content: We use your information to provide our services, communicate with you, improve our offerings, and comply with legal obligations.

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We implement robust security measures to protect your data, including encryption, access controls, and regular security audits.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. Contact us to exercise these rights.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: For privacy-related inquiries, please contact our data protection team.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using this website, you accept and agree to be bound by these terms and conditions.

services.title: Our Services
services.content: Habb.ch provides technology solutions and services. Specific terms may apply to individual services as outlined in separate agreements.

intellectual.title: Intellectual Property
intellectual.content: All content on this website, including text, graphics, and software, is the property of Habb.ch and protected by intellectual property laws.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Habb.ch shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our services.

governing.title: Governing Law
governing.content: These terms are governed by the laws of Switzerland. Any disputes shall be resolved in Swiss courts.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of updated terms.
